jsonRecipe.name: Strawberry smoothie
jsonRecipe.recipe: In a blender combine strawberries, milk, yogurt, sugar and vanilla. Toss in the ice. Blend until smooth and creamy. Pour into glasses and serve.

jsonRecipe.name: Strawberry-Banana
jsonRecipe.recipe: Blend 1 banana, 1 cup strawberries, 1/2 cup each vanilla yogurt and milk, 2 teaspoons honey, a pinch of cinnamon and 1 cup ice.

jsonRecipe.name: Strawberry Short Cake
jsonRecipe.recipe: Blend 2 cups strawberries, 1 cup crumbled pound cake, 1 1/2 cups each milk and ice, and sugar to taste. Top with whipped cream and more strawberries.

jsonRecipe.name: Triple-Berry Blend
jsonRecipe.recipe: 1 1/2 cups mixed blackberries, strawberries and raspberries with 1 cup each milk and ice, and sugar to taste.

jsonRecipe.name: Raspberry-Orange
jsonRecipe.recipe: Blend 1 cup each orange juice and raspberries, 1/2 cup plain yogurt, 1 cup ice, and sugar to taste.

jsonRecipe.name: Peach-Mango-Banana
jsonRecipe.recipe: Blend 1 cup each chopped fresh or frozen peaches and mango, 1 cup each plain yogurt and ice, 1/2 banana, and sugar to taste.

jsonRecipe.name: Honeydew-Almond
jsonRecipe.recipe: Blend 2 cups chopped honeydew melon, 1 cup each almond milk and ice, and honey to taste.

jsonRecipe.name: Cantaloupe
jsonRecipe.recipe: Blend 2 cups chopped cantaloupe, the juice of 1/2 lime, 3 tablespoons sugar, 1/2 cup water and 1 cup ice.

jsonRecipe.name: Carrot-Apple
jsonRecipe.recipe: Blend 1 cup each carrot juice and apple juice with 1 1/2 cups ice.

jsonRecipe.name: Spa Cucumber
jsonRecipe.recipe: Peel, seed and chop 2 medium cucumbers. Blend with the juice of 1 lime, 1/2 cup water, 1 cup ice and 3 to 4 tablespoons sugar or honey.
